blocks.text: City cut Arsenal's lead to three — the title race is alive again
Arsenal's four-point cushion evaporated at the Etihad on Sunday. Three points, nine games to go — City have momentum and a kindly-looking run-in. This is wide open.
🎾 Mon 06:00 — Casper Ruud opens at Mutua Madrid Open, his favourite clay hunting ground

blocks.label: ⚽ La Liga title run-in
items: Tue 21:30 — Real Madrid vs Alavés (9 pts behind Barça, must win)
Wed 21:30 — Barcelona vs Celta Vigo (can Barça go 12 clear?)
Fri 21:00 — Real Madrid at Real Betis ★ (title pressure meets Europa ambition)

blocks.text: 🎮 Thu 17:00 — rain joins 100 Thieves vs BIG at CCT Global Finals, Porto
